_doc: Filter #3 — 4 options with inline feasibility tags (one per option). Trigger short-circuits before validator call. No block.

content.text:
Four options on the table:

1. A: do nothing (unilateral)
2. B: amend SLA (amendment-required)
3. C: sublease F&B (consent-required)
4. D: pursue litigation against operator (litigation)

Recommendation: B — amendment-required is the cleanest path.
